The '''3HX3 timer mine''' was a model of [[Land mine/Legends|land mine]] manufactured by [[Conner Ship Systems]].

==Description==
The 3HX3 timer [[Mine/Legends|mine]] was a simple [[Land mine/Legends|land mine]] produced by [[Conner Ship Systems]]. The mine was equipped with a number of [[Explosive charge/Legends|explosive charges]], and outfitted with a [[Repulsor Sensor|repulsor-field sensor]] and a [[Life-form scanner/Legends|life-form sensor]]. When either [[Sensor/Legends|sensor]] detected a vehicle or [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]], the 3HX3 launched one of its explosive charges. Each charge could reach a height of three [[Meter/Legends|meters]] and was extremely potent. The charge was capable of severely damaging enemy vehicles such as [[Landspeeder/Legends|landspeeders]] or [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-ST]] [[Walker/Legends|walkers]], or wiping out an entire [[Squad/Legends|squad]] of troops.<ref name="EGWT" />

==History==
[[Rebel Vanguard/Legends|Rebel vanguard divisions]] carried 3HX3 mines during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="BF I">''[[Star Wars: Battlefront]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The 3HX3 mines appear in the ''[[Star Wars: Battlefront]]'' [[Star Wars video games|video game]] series.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Battlefront]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Battlefront II]]''
